name: pr-in-the-loop
description: Issue-first engineering workflow, PR planning, and implementation spec skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create Issues, plan PRs, and execute specs.
interface.longDescription: PR In The Loop packages issue-first development workflows for Codex. It can inspect repository and work-tool context, narrow ambiguous engineering work into one concrete GitHub Issue, turn an existing Issue into human-reviewable PR plan documents split into minimum functional phases, and convert those PR plans into local implementation specs for immediate development.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $pr-in-the-loop:open-issue to turn current work context into a GitHub Issue, use $pr-in-the-loop:planning-pr to write reviewable PR plan documents, then use $pr-in-the-loop:plan-n-dev to write the local implementation spec and implement it.
